description: Daniel Lev discusses the need for crypto payments, highlighting the inefficiencies of the current payment system and the advantages of blockchain technology. He explains how crypto payments can reduce transaction fees, increase speed, and provide self-custody of assets. The talk also covers the crypto payments market landscape and the importance of settlement layers in payment systems.
topic_summary: The presentation explores the shortcomings of traditional payment systems and the benefits of adopting crypto payments, including lower costs, faster transactions, and enhanced user control over assets. It emphasizes the global and scalable nature of crypto payments, particularly on platforms like Solana.
